content:
🔥 pi-mono | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Developing and deploying AI agents and AI-powered applications.
✨ Key Features: • Unified multi-provider LLM API (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.) • Agent runtime with tool calling and state management • Interactive coding agent CLI • Terminal UI library with differential rendering • Web components for AI chat interfaces
📖 Summary: The pi-mono repository provides a comprehensive toolkit for building AI agents, offering a unified LLM API, an agent runtime, a coding agent CLI, and libraries for TUI and web UIs. It aims to simplify the development and deployment of AI-powered applications and agents.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
